prompt_text:
### Demographics: 76-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~3.8 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 85.9 kg; Height 173.6 cm; BMI 28.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 138/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 8.5%; 6 months ago 8.0%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 185mg/dL; 9 months ago 197mg/dL; 6 months ago 178mg/dL; 3 months ago 187mg/dL; current 135mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 86.7kg; 9 months ago 81.6kg; 6 months ago 86.2kg; 3 months ago 80.8kg; current 85.9kg), Height (12 months ago 173.6cm; 9 months ago 173.6cm; 6 months ago 173.6cm; 3 months ago 173.6cm; current 173.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 27.0kg/m²; current 28.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 136mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 139mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 138mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 19U/L), AST (12 months ago 9U/L; 9 months ago 10U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 13U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 95mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 97mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 94mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 94mL/min/1.73m²; current 95mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 64mg/g; 9 months ago 61mg/g; 6 months ago 83mg/g; 3 months ago 58mg/g; current 72mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 89mg/dL; 3 months ago 85mg/dL; current 86mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 53mg/dL; 3 months ago 55mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 154mg/dL; 9 months ago 167mg/dL; 6 months ago 152mg/dL; 3 months ago 150mg/dL; current 161mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 15.3g/dL; 9 months ago 14.7g/dL; 6 months ago 14.7g/dL; 3 months ago 14.8g/dL; current 15.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
